ads.ad_copy: When Fans Say It Better Than We Ever Could. Meet The NEW Aspen Shoulder bag 💬✨ "Love the gorgeous silhouette of Aspen, it is so light weight, can be casual or dressy. Quietly makes a statement where ever you carry it. Perfect for work or play. Love the color options available." Olivia R. "Can I give this 10 stars?!? The Aspen is not only gorgeous, classy, and a fun structured yet slouchy shape- she has so much room. It is comfortable and stays on my shoulder well. I will buy this bag in every color it comes on." Harper V. "I now understand what everyone is saying about Purse Peace. I have found it with this Aspen and have quickly started a collection. Night Owl, Plum and waiting for Sea Glass to arrive. Happy Happy!" Brittany K. "I was gifted the medium Aspen bag in plum, and it is stunning! It's a great size (neither too big or too small) on my 5'4" frame, and not too slouchy. It has a ton of room for everything I want to carry as well as extra room for when my kids or husband ask me to "hold this for me". The plum color is gorgeous yet subtle and you can tell it is well made!" Jessica M. "Chili Red Gives Me LIFE. I was looking for a not-too-large shoulder bag with a zipper and the medium Aspen is the perfect size for me! I usually go for cooler colors so I wanted to try something new and took a chance on Chili Red. I LOVE her so much! Perfect size, wonderfully squishy leather, and I love the black zipper and bronze/gold buckle!" Avery T. The Aspen Shoulder Bag | 10 Colors | Softest Leather
